title: Easy Bell Crafting
description: Need bells for decoration? If you don't want to run around villages, download this mod and enjoy the ability to easily create bells.
body:
Need bells for decoration? If you don't want to run around villages, download this mod and enjoy the ability to easily create bells.

![Bell Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5cc63a4666f3668c437fdfd55af5034c1359bb7.png)
